query: INSERT INTO cards (cardId, name, cardType, rarity, alignment, element, dimension, characterClass, species, faction, cost, power, health, abilityText, flavorText, imageUrl, loredexEntryId, album, season, keywords, unlockMethod, isActive) VALUES ('sih_001', 'The Two Witnesses', 'character', 'epic', 'order', 'fire', 'reality', 'oracle', 'demagi', NULL, 4, 5, 7, 'When deployed, reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. If any are spells, cast them for free. Both Witnesses must fall to end this effect.', 'They testified against the empire with fire in their mouths and truth in their bones.', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663032080159/2quXz2C2n5hMfqc8hNVW3h/sih_001_two_witnesses-T8rSqyZ5THhDHczVHSsChr.webp', NULL, 'Silence in Heaven', 'Season 2', '["prophecy", "shield"]', 'story', 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name=VALUES(name), imageUrl=VALUES(imageUrl), abilityText=VALUES(abilityText), flavorText=VALUES(flavorText), power=VALUES(power), health=VALUES(health), cost=VALUES(cost), rarity=VALUES(rarity)
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2T9erPMfbTpx4Y5.root --database 2quXz2C2n5hMfqc8hNVW3h --execute INSERT INTO cards (cardId, name, cardType, rarity, alignment, element, dimension, characterClass, species, faction, cost, power, health, abilityText, flavorText, imageUrl, loredexEntryId, album, season, keywords, unlockMethod, isActive) VALUES ('sih_001', 'The Two Witnesses', 'character', 'epic', 'order', 'fire', 'reality', 'oracle', 'demagi', NULL, 4, 5, 7, 'When deployed, reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. If any are spells, cast them for free. Both Witnesses must fall to end this effect.', 'They testified against the empire with fire in their mouths and truth in their bones.', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663032080159/2quXz2C2n5hMfqc8hNVW3h/sih_001_two_witnesses-T8rSqyZ5THhDHczVHSsChr.webp', NULL, 'Silence in Heaven', 'Season 2', '["prophecy", "shield"]', 'story', 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name=VALUES(name), imageUrl=VALUES(imageUrl), abilityText=VALUES(abilityText), flavorText=VALUES(flavorText), power=VALUES(power), health=VALUES(health), cost=VALUES(cost), rarity=VALUES(rarity)
